title: polypodium obovatum
intro: Polypodium obovatum is a species of fern native to southern Africa, specifically in the provinces of KwaZulu-Natal and the Eastern Cape of South Africa, and also in Mozambique. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium obovatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat various skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. Polypodium obovatum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form.
